build.beforeDevCommand: sh -c "pwd && ls -la && if [ -d ./frontend ]; then cd ./frontend; elif [ -d ./app/frontend ]; then cd ./app/frontend; else echo 'frontend folder not found'; exit 1; fi && npm run dev"
build.beforeBuildCommand: sh -c "if [ -d ./frontend ]; then cd ./frontend && npm run build; elif [ -d ./app/frontend ]; then cd ./app/frontend && npm run build; else echo 'frontend folder not found'; exit 1; fi"
